_____________ test_env_base_template_generates_factor_environments _____________

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-shaoyou/pytest-1/test_env_base_template_generat0')

    def test_env_base_template_generates_factor_environments(tmp_path):
        write(
            tmp_path,
            "tox.toml",
            """
            env_list = ["lint"]
    
            [env_run_base]
            package = "skip"
            skip_install = true
            commands = [["python", "-c", "print('base')"]]
    
            [env_base.test]
            factors = ["py310", "py311"]
            description = "test {env_name}"
    
            [env.lint]
            description = "lint"
            """,
        )
